title: crocus ilvensis
intro: Crocus ilvensis, also known as the Wheatear or Corsican Crocus, is a species of flowering plant in the iris family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Crocus ilvensis include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and ease congestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Crocus ilvensis often involve drying and processing the flowers to create teas, tinctures, or infusions that can be used to alleviate respiratory symptoms.
